steps.t: Mashûmi believes Glimglam was captured by brigands and brought back to the Hold of Jalkhíla. Explore the Hold of Jalkhíla and search for Glimglam. The…
Open Glimglam's cage to free him.
Return to Mashûmi in Sen Chatâk and let her know her tortoise is now free.
